tools.name: optimize_text
tools.description: Compress and cache text to reduce token usage. Returns compressed version and saves to cache for future use.

key.description: Cache key for storing the optimized text

tools.name: get_cached
tools.description: Retrieve previously cached and optimized text. Returns the original text if found in cache.

tools.name: count_tokens
tools.description: Count tokens in text using tiktoken. Useful for understanding token usage before and after optimization.

tools.name: compress_text
tools.description: Compress text using Brotli compression. Returns compressed text as base64 string.

tools.name: decompress_text
tools.description: Decompress base64-encoded Brotli-compressed text.

tools.name: get_cache_stats
tools.description: Get cache statistics including hit rate, compression ratio, and token savings.

tools.name: clear_cache
tools.description: Clear all cached data. Use with caution.

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm cache clearing

tools.name: analyze_optimization
tools.description: Analyze text and provide recommendations for optimization including compression benefits and token savings.

tools.name: get_session_stats
tools.description: Get comprehensive statistics from the PowerShell wrapper session tracker including system reminders, tool operations, and total tokens with accurate tiktoken-based counting.

sessionId.description: Optional session ID to query. If not provided, uses current session.

tools.name: optimize_session
tools.description: Analyzes operations in the current session from the operations CSV, identifies large text blocks from file-based tools (Read, Write, Edit), compresses them, and stores them in the cache to reduce future token usage. Returns a summary of the optimization.

sessionId.description: Optional session ID to optimize. If not provided, uses the current active session.

min_token_threshold.description: Minimum token count for a file operation to be considered for compression. Defaults to 30.

tools.name: analyze_project_tokens
tools.description: Analyze token usage and estimate costs across multiple sessions within a project. Aggregates data from all operations-*.csv files, provides project-level statistics, identifies top contributing sessions and tools, and estimates monetary costs based on token usage.

projectPath.description: Path to the project directory. If not provided, uses the hooks data directory.

costPerMillionTokens.description: Cost per million tokens in USD. Defaults to 30 (GPT-4 Turbo pricing).

tools.name: predictive_cache
tools.description: ML-based predictive caching with 91%+ token reduction using ARIMA, exponential smoothing, LSTM, and collaborative filtering

operation.description: The predictive cache operation to perform

tools.name: cache_warmup
tools.description: Intelligent cache pre-warming with 87%+ token reduction, featuring schedule-based warming, pattern analysis, dependency resolution, and progressive warming strategies

schedule.description: Cron expression for scheduled warmup (e.g., '0 * * * *' for hourly)

minAccessCount.description: Minimum access count for hot keys (default: 5)

timeWindow.description: Time window for pattern analysis in ms (default: 3600000)

hotKeyThreshold.description: Minimum access count for hot keys

timeout.description: Timeout for warmup operations in ms (default: 30000)

tools.name: smart_ast_grep
tools.description: Perform structural code search with 83% token reduction through AST indexing and caching

projectPath.description: Root directory of the project to search

filePattern.description: Specific directory or file pattern to search (e.g., "src/**/*.ts")

contextLines.description: Number of context lines around matches

maxMatches.description: Maximum number of matches to return

enableCache.description: Enable AST index and pattern caching

tools.name: cache_analytics
tools.description: Comprehensive cache analytics with 88%+ token reduction. Real-time dashboards, trend analysis, alerting, heatmaps, bottleneck detection, and cost optimization.

useCache.description: Enable caching of analytics results (default: true)

tools.name: cache-benchmark
tools.description:
Cache Performance Benchmarking with 89% token reduction through comprehensive testing and analysis.

Features:
- Strategy comparison (LRU vs LFU vs FIFO vs TTL vs size vs hybrid)
- Load testing with configurable concurrency and ramp-up
- Latency profiling with percentiles (p50, p90, p95, p99, p99.9)
- Throughput testing (operations per second)
- Comprehensive reports in markdown, HTML, JSON, PDF
- Workload simulation (read-heavy, write-heavy, mixed, realistic)

Operations:
- run-benchmark: Execute complete benchmark suite
- compare: Compare multiple cache configurations
- load-test: Stress test cache under load
- latency-test: Measure latency distribution with percentiles
- throughput-test: Measure throughput limits
- report: Generate comprehensive benchmark report

Token Reduction:
- Benchmark results: ~89% (summary only)
- Comparison: ~91% (rankings + winner)
- Load test: ~88% (summary + breaking point)
- Latency test: ~87% (percentiles only)
- Throughput test: ~90% (key metrics only)
- Report: ~85% (formatted summary)
- Average: 89% reduction

stepSize.description: Concurrency step size for load test (default: 10)

benchmarkId.description: ID of benchmark results to generate report for

tools.name: cache_compression
tools.description: Advanced compression strategies for cache optimization with 89%+ token reduction. Supports 6 algorithms (gzip, brotli, lz4, zstd, snappy, custom), adaptive selection, dictionary-based compression, and delta compression for time-series data.

dataType.description: Data type hint for adaptive compression

targetRatio.description: Target compression ratio for optimize operation (0-1)

autoSelect.description: Enable auto-selection of algorithm based on data type

enableDelta.description: Enable delta compression for time-series data

tools.name: cache_invalidation
tools.description: Comprehensive cache invalidation with 88%+ token reduction, dependency tracking, pattern matching, scheduled invalidation, and distributed coordination

operation.description: The cache invalidation operation to perform

keys.description: Array of cache keys to invalidate

pattern.description: Pattern for matching keys (wildcards: * for any chars, ? for single char)

tag.description: Tag to invalidate all associated keys

childKeys.description: Array of child keys for dependency relationship

repeatInterval.description: Interval in ms for repeating scheduled invalidation

maxAuditEntries.description: Maximum audit log entries to keep (default: 10000)

skipExpired.description: Skip expired entries during validation (default: true)

tools.name: cache_optimizer
tools.description: Advanced cache optimization with 89%+ token reduction. Analyzes performance, benchmarks strategies, provides ML-based recommendations, detects bottlenecks, and performs cost-benefit analysis.

analysisWindow.description: Time window in milliseconds for analysis (default: 3600000)

epochs.description: Number of training epochs for tuning (default: 50)

tools.name: cache_partition
tools.description: Advanced cache partitioning and sharding with 87%+ token reduction through consistent hashing, automatic rebalancing, and partition isolation

keyPattern.description: Regex pattern for keys to migrate

targetDistribution.description: Target distribution strategy for rebalancing (default: even)

maxMigrations.description: Maximum number of migrations during rebalance (default: 1000)

virtualNodes.description: Number of virtual nodes per partition (default: 150)

includeKeyDistribution.description: Include key distribution in statistics (default: true)

includeMemoryUsage.description: Include memory usage in statistics (default: true)

tools.name: cache_replication
tools.description: Distributed cache replication with 88%+ token reduction. Supports primary-replica and multi-primary modes, strong/eventual consistency, automatic conflict resolution, failover, incremental sync, and health monitoring.

syncInterval.description: Sync interval in milliseconds (for configure operation)

heartbeatInterval.description: Heartbeat interval in milliseconds (for configure operation)

writeQuorum.description: Number of replicas required for writes (for configure operation)

readQuorum.description: Number of replicas required for reads (for configure operation)

weight.description: Node weight for load balancing (for add-replica operation)

force.description: Force sync even if up-to-date (for sync operation)

deltaOnly.description: Sync only delta changes (for sync operation)

includeMetadata.description: Include snapshot data in response (for snapshot operation)

tools.name: smart_cache
tools.description: Advanced multi-tier cache with 90%+ token reduction, 6 eviction strategies, stampede prevention, and automatic tier management

values.description: Array of key-value pairs (for batch-set operation)

tier.description: Cache tier (for set operation, default: L1)

l1MaxSize.description: Maximum L1 cache size (for configure operation)

l2MaxSize.description: Maximum L2 cache size (for configure operation)

defaultTTL.description: Default TTL in milliseconds (for configure operation)

exportDelta.description: Export only changes since last snapshot (for export operation)

importData.description: JSON data to import (for import operation)

tools.name: smart_sql
tools.description: SQL query analyzer with optimization suggestions and execution plan analysis (83% token reduction)

tools.name: smart_schema
tools.description: Database schema analyzer with intelligent caching and 83% token reduction. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite. Provides schema introspection, relationship analysis, index recommendations, and schema diff.

mode.description: Output mode: full (complete schema), summary (statistics only, 95% reduction), analysis (issues only, 85% reduction), diff (compare schemas, 90% reduction)

compareWith.description: Second connection string for diff mode (compare two databases)

forceRefresh.description: Force refresh schema analysis, bypassing cache

includeData.description: Include row counts and table sizes in analysis

analyzeTables.description: Specific tables to analyze (all if not specified)

detectUnusedIndexes.description: Detect potentially unused indexes (requires database statistics)

tools.name: smart_api_fetch
tools.description:
Execute HTTP requests with intelligent caching and retry logic.

Features:
- Automatic retry with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s)
- Response caching with TTL-based invalidation (default: 5 minutes)
- Request deduplication for in-flight requests
- Circuit breaker pattern (opens after 5 consecutive failures)
- ETag/Cache-Control header support
- 83% average token reduction through intelligent output formatting

Token Reduction Strategy:
- Cached responses: 95% reduction (summary only)
- Error responses: 90% reduction (error details only)
- Retried requests: 85% reduction (success summary with retry info)
- First requests: 80% reduction (compact summary)

Perfect for:
- API integration and testing
- Webhook handling
- External service communication
- Data fetching with resilience

force.description: Force fresh request, ignore cache (default: false)

tools.name: smart-cache-api
tools.description:
API Response Caching with 83% token reduction through intelligent cache management.

Features:
- Multiple caching strategies (TTL, ETag, Event-based, LRU, Size-based)
- Intelligent cache key generation with query normalization
- Pattern-based and tag-based invalidation
- Stale-while-revalidate support
- Cache hit rate analysis and recommendations
- Cache warming and preloading

Actions:
- get: Retrieve cached API response
- set: Cache an API response
- invalidate: Remove cached entries (pattern/tag/manual)
- analyze: Get cache performance metrics
- warm: Pre-cache specific endpoints

Token Reduction:
- Cache hit: ~95% (summary only)
- Cache miss: 0% (full response)
- Stale cache: ~95% (stale summary)
- Invalidation: ~98% (count only)
- Analysis: ~90% (statistics only)
- Average: 83% reduction

ignoreHeaders.description: Headers to exclude from cache key

tools.name: smart_database
tools.description: Database query optimizer with connection pooling, circuit breaking, and 83% token reduction. Supports query execution, EXPLAIN analysis, performance optimization, health monitoring, slow query detection, and batch operations.

query.description: SQL query to execute (required for query/explain/analyze/optimize)

queries.description: Array of queries for batch execution

force.description: Force fresh query, bypassing cache (default: false)

enableRetry.description: Enable automatic retry on failure (default: true)

tools.name: smart_graphql
tools.description: GraphQL query optimizer with complexity analysis and caching (83% token reduction)

tools.name: smart_migration
tools.description: Database migration tracker with status monitoring and 83% token reduction. Supports listing migrations, checking status, viewing history, rollback operations, and migration generation.

migrationId.description: Migration ID (required for rollback and generate actions)

limit.description: Maximum number of results (default: 20 for list/pending, 50 for history)

tools.name: smart_orm
tools.description: ORM query optimizer with N+1 detection (83% token reduction)

ormCode.description: ORM query code to analyze (Prisma, TypeORM, Sequelize, Mongoose)

modelDefinitions.description: Optional schema/model definitions for enhanced analysis

force.description: Force fresh analysis, bypass cache (default: false)

tools.name: smart_rest
tools.description: REST API analyzer with endpoint discovery and health scoring (83% token reduction)

specUrl.description: OpenAPI/Swagger spec URL (not yet supported, use specContent)

baseUrl.description: Base API URL (optional, extracted from spec if not provided)

checkHealth.description: Check API health and generate score (default: false)

detectPatterns.description: Detect API patterns (auth, versioning, etc.) (default: false)

force.description: Force fresh analysis, bypass cache (default: false)

tools.name: smart_websocket
tools.description: WebSocket connection manager with message tracking (83% token reduction)

tools.name: alert_manager
tools.description: Comprehensive alerting system with multi-channel notifications, intelligent routing, and 89% token reduction through aggressive caching and history aggregation

operation.description: The alert management operation to perform

alertId.description: Alert identifier (required for update, delete, trigger, silence operations)

alertName.description: Alert name (required for create operation, optional for others)

condition.description: Alert condition configuration (required for create operation)

silenceDuration.description: Silence duration in seconds (required for silence operation)

timeRange.description: Time range filter for history operation

limit.description: Maximum number of history events to return

useCache.description: Enable caching for this operation (default: true)

cacheTTL.description: Cache TTL in seconds (optional, uses defaults if not specified)

tools.name: metric_collector
tools.description: Comprehensive metrics collection and aggregation with multi-source support, time-series compression, and 88% token reduction through delta encoding and intelligent caching

operation.description: The metric collector operation to perform

tools.name: monitoring_integration
tools.description: External monitoring platform integration with 87% token reduction through data compression and intelligent caching

operation.description: The monitoring integration operation to perform

tools.name: custom_widget
tools.description: Create and manage custom dashboard widgets with 88% token reduction through template caching and configuration compression

widgetId.description: Widget ID (required for update, delete, render)

includeData.description: Include data source in render output

tools.name: data_visualizer
tools.description: Create and manage interactive data visualizations with 92% token reduction through SVG/Canvas optimization and configuration caching

chartId.description: Chart ID (required for update, delete, render)

data.description: Chart data with labels and datasets

tools.name: health_monitor
tools.description: Monitor system and application health with 91% token reduction through health state compression and metric aggregation

tools.name: log_dashboard
tools.description: Interactive log analysis dashboard with filtering, searching, pattern detection, and 90% token reduction through intelligent caching and compression

operation.description: The log dashboard operation to perform

logFiles.description: Paths to log files to analyze

tools.name: intelligent-assistant
tools.description: Provides intelligent assistance including contextual help, suggestions, explanations, and troubleshooting

tools.name: natural-language-query
tools.description: Natural language query translation and optimization

tools.name: pattern-recognition
tools.description: Pattern detection and analysis in logs, metrics, and events

tools.name: predictive-analytics
tools.description: Predictive modeling and forecasting for system metrics

tools.name: recommendation-engine
tools.description: Intelligent recommendations for optimization and resource allocation

tools.name: smart-summarization
tools.description: Intelligent content summarization and digest generation

tools.name: smart_processes
tools.description: Monitor and analyze system processes with anomaly detection and resource tracking

cpuThreshold.description: Show only high CPU usage processes (> threshold %)

memoryThreshold.description: Show only high memory usage processes (> threshold MB)

limit.description: Maximum number of processes to show

tools.name: smart_network
tools.description: Network diagnostics and monitoring with connectivity testing, port scanning, DNS resolution, and anomaly detection

pingCount.description: Number of ping attempts per host

tools.name: smart_logs
tools.description: System log aggregation and analysis with multi-source support, pattern filtering, error detection, and insights

sources.description: Log sources to aggregate (file paths or system logs)

tools.name: smart_lint
tools.description: Run ESLint with intelligent caching, incremental analysis, and auto-fix suggestions

onlyNew.description: Show only new issues since last run

tools.name: smart_install
tools.description: Package installation with dependency analysis, conflict detection, and smart caching for npm/yarn/pnpm

packageManager.description: Package manager to use (auto-detect if not specified)

packages.description: Packages to install (if empty, installs all from package.json)

tools.name: smart_docker
tools.description: Docker operations with build/run/stop/logs support, image layer analysis, and optimization suggestions

tail.description: Number of log lines to show

tools.name: smart_build
tools.description: Run TypeScript build with intelligent caching, diff-based change detection, and token-optimized output

tools.name: smart_system_metrics
tools.description: System resource monitoring with CPU, memory, disk usage tracking, anomaly detection, and performance recommendations

diskPaths.description: Disk paths to monitor (default: root partition)

detectAnomalies.description: Detect anomalies by comparing with previous snapshot

tools.name: smart_test
tools.description: Run tests with intelligent caching, coverage tracking, and incremental test execution

onlyChanged.description: Run only tests that changed since last run

tools.name: smart_typecheck
tools.description: Run TypeScript type checking with intelligent caching and categorized error reporting

watch.description: Watch mode for continuous type checking

tools.name: smart_cron
tools.description: Intelligent scheduled task management with smart caching (85%+ token reduction). Manage cron jobs (Linux/macOS) and Windows Task Scheduler with validation, history tracking, and next run predictions.

schedule.description: Cron expression (e.g., "0 2 * * *" for daily at 2am) or Windows schedule

user.description: User to run the task as

historyLimit.description: Number of history entries to retrieve (default: 50)

predictCount.description: Number of future runs to predict (default: 5)

useCache.description: Use cached results when available (default: true)

ttl.description: Cache TTL in seconds (default: 60 for list, 30 for history, 300 for predictions)

tools.name: smart_user
tools.description: Intelligent user and permission management with smart caching (86%+ token reduction). Manage users, groups, permissions, ACLs, and perform security audits across Windows, Linux, and macOS.

path.description: File/directory path for permission checks and ACL operations

includeSystemUsers.description: Include system users in user listings (default: false)

includeSystemGroups.description: Include system groups in group listings (default: false)

useCache.description: Use cached results when available (default: true)

ttl.description: Cache TTL in seconds (default: varies by operation)

tools.name: smart_diff
tools.description: Get git diffs with 85% token reduction through diff-only output and smart filtering

source.description: Source commit/branch to compare from (default: HEAD)

target.description: Target commit/branch to compare to (default: working directory)

summaryOnly.description: Only return statistics, not diff content

limit.description: Maximum number of files to diff

tools.name: smart_branch
tools.description: List and manage git branches with 60% token reduction through structured JSON output and smart filtering

all.description: Include both local and remote branches

namesOnly.description: Only return branch names without metadata

tools.name: smart_merge
tools.description: Manage git merges with 80% token reduction through structured status and conflict management

branch.description: Branch to merge from (for merge mode)

commit.description: Specific commit to merge (for merge mode)

tools.name: smart_status
tools.description: Get git status with 70% token reduction through status-only output and smart filtering

summaryOnly.description: Return counts only, not file lists

includeDetail.description: Include diff output for specific files

detailFiles.description: Files to include diff for (requires includeDetail)

tools.name: smart_log
tools.description: Get git commit history with 75% token reduction through structured JSON output and smart filtering

branch.description: Specific branch to query (default: current branch)

author.description: Filter by author name or email

filePath.description: Only show commits affecting this file/directory

tools.name: smart_read
tools.description: Read files with 80% token reduction through intelligent caching, diff-based updates, and syntax-aware optimization

path.description: Path to the file to read

diffMode.description: Return only diff if file was previously read (default: true)

maxSize.description: Maximum content size to return in bytes (default: 100000)

chunkSize.description: Size of chunks for large files (default: 4000)

chunkIndex.description: For chunked files, the chunk index to retrieve

tools.name: smart_write
tools.description: Write files with 85% token reduction through verification, atomic operations, and change tracking

path.description: Path to the file to write

content.description: Content to write to the file

verifyBeforeWrite.description: Skip write if content is identical

atomic.description: Use atomic write with temporary file

returnDiff.description: Return diff instead of full content

tools.name: smart_edit
tools.description: Edit files with 90% token reduction through line-based operations and diff-only output

path.description: Path to the file to edit

returnDiff.description: Return diff instead of full content

tools.name: smart_glob
tools.description: Search files with glob patterns and 75% token reduction through path-only results and smart filtering

includeMetadata.description: Include file metadata (size, modified date, etc.)

includeContent.description: Include file content for small files

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: smart_grep
tools.description: Search file contents with 80% token reduction through match-only output and smart filtering

count.description: Only return match counts per file
